raw_consumer_statement:
I was overbilled for an XXXXXXXX XXXX XXXX  in XX/XX/year>XXXX  and to date the matter has not been resolved. I have supplied every possible documentation and supporting documentation while Amex allowed the claim to go through even without a valid signature from me and incomplete information from the merchant. The amount of the charge was 75 % of my credit limit and created a severe issue with my spending limit and reporting to the credit bureaus. This year again two more charges were allowed even though documentation was presented to support my claim of overcharge and it has now sent my account into a negative balance again reporting this to the credit bureaus. All three charges pushed my balance beyond my credit limit that Amex refused to increase while they slowly investigated the claims. 

Claims were denied due to lack of supporting documents that were sitting the portal the entire time. The customer service has been extremely poor and now my credit scores have taken a major hit due to these over charges. I have not received sky miles in six months and other use of other benefits with my credit card.
